The post The Bug Club – “Yours (If You Want Me)” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Every Single Muscle is the latest dispatch from the prolific and energetic Welsh duo the Bug Club. We heard about it last month when they released lead single "Watching The Omnibus," and we're hearing about it again today. There's another Bug Club single, you see, one that finds them raucously rocking out and harmonizing like it's the '60s and "Twist And Shout" is next up on the setlist. 

Lyrically, "Yours (If You Want Me)" is more likely to remind you of a different era in English rock history. "I don't want to be adored," Sam Willmett and Tilly Harris repeat near the end. "Though I'm yours if you want me." Listen below and see if you don't fall in love.

Every Single Muscle is out 5/29 on Sub Pop. Pre-order it here.
